strategy: Open with Fist, Claw, Sharp Tooth, Ghost Flint; commit to one damage lane early so your shops stay coherent.
Build around your healing loop first (lifesteal/regen trigger), then amplify damage once sustain is reliable.
Avoid overinvesting in redundant sustain if your kit already overcaps one healing source.

characters.name: Sailor
characters.stats: +200% damage with Naval weapons against cursed enemies; +25 Curse; -25 % Damage; You can only equip tier II weapons or above; Dodge is capped at 20%; Harvesting modifications are reduced by 100%
characters.recommendedStartReason: Naval synergy and curse interactions make Anchor the most coherent opener.
strategy: Open with Anchor, Trident, Blunderbuss; commit to one damage lane early so your shops stay coherent.
Secure early economy multipliers, then cash out into combat stats before elite timings.
Do not over-greed past wave 10: convert surplus into immediate survivability and clear speed.
Enemy density/strength is modified here, so adjust positioning: kite longer on horde maps and preposition for elites.

characters.name: Builder
characters.stats: You start with 1 Builder's Turret;; Every 5 uncollected materials are converted into 1 % Structure attack speed and 1 Structure Range at the end of a wave; Engineering modifications are increased by 50%; +20 Harvesting; You can't have structures; -30% pickup range; Damage modifications are reduced by 75%

strategy: Open with Brick, Plank, Javelin, Double Barrel Shotgun; commit to one damage lane early so your shops stay coherent.
Prioritize Engineering + survivability; treat direct weapon DPS as secondary unless your passive converts another stat into structures.
Stack structure density and uptime before greed, then add attack speed/range support to convert turret uptime into wave control.

characters.name: Captain
